prompt: Coordinate a research agent and a writing agent to produce a 500-word article on quantum computing trends.
Orchestrate a data collection agent, analysis agent, and reporting agent to analyze user churn data.
Coordinate a code generation agent, code review agent, and testing agent to implement a bubble sort function.
Orchestrate three agents to debate the pros and cons of nuclear energy and reach a consensus.
Coordinate a planning agent and execution agent to plan and simulate deploying a web application.
Orchestrate agents to collectively fact-check a news article: one agent per claim.
Coordinate a research agent and summarization agent to produce an executive brief on climate policy.
Orchestrate a translator agent, proofreader agent, and formatter agent to translate a technical document.
Coordinate an orchestrator agent with two worker agents to complete a task decomposed into parallel subtasks.
Orchestrate three agents with different expertise (medical, legal, financial) to give holistic advice on a scenario.
Coordinate a data cleaning agent and visualization agent to process and chart a dataset.
Orchestrate a specification agent, implementation agent, and documentation agent for a software feature.
Coordinate agents to run a structured literature review: one agent per paper section.
Orchestrate a debate between two agents: one argues for AI regulation, one against.
Coordinate a requirement gathering agent and architecture design agent for a new system.
Orchestrate a brainstorming agent, evaluation agent, and selection agent for product name generation.
Coordinate a sentiment analysis agent and recommendation agent to process customer feedback.
Orchestrate three agents to iteratively improve a machine learning model: trainer, evaluator, tuner.
Coordinate a search agent and synthesis agent to answer: 'What are the latest advances in battery technology?'
Orchestrate agents to perform a SWOT analysis, with each agent handling one quadrant.
Coordinate a task decomposition agent and five specialized execution agents for a complex pipeline.
Orchestrate a monitoring agent and remediation agent to detect and fix a simulated system issue.
Coordinate a query agent and explanation agent to answer technical database questions.
Orchestrate two agents to collaboratively write and critique a research abstract.
Coordinate a risk identification agent and mitigation planning agent for a software project.
Orchestrate a grading agent and feedback agent to evaluate a student's essay.
Coordinate an interview agent and evaluation agent to assess a candidate's technical skills.
Orchestrate a legal research agent and contract drafting agent for a simple NDA template.
Coordinate agents to collectively solve a multi-step math word problem, one agent per step.
Orchestrate a news aggregation agent and priority ranking agent to produce a morning briefing.
Coordinate a competitive research agent and strategic recommendation agent for market analysis.
Orchestrate a code generation agent and security audit agent to build a login form.
Coordinate three agents to plan, execute, and review a data backup strategy.
Orchestrate a customer support agent and escalation agent for handling a complex complaint.
Coordinate a recipe generation agent and ingredient optimization agent for meal planning.
Orchestrate a citation agent and bias detection agent for academic fact-checking.
Coordinate a prediction agent and confidence calibration agent for forecasting tasks.
Orchestrate a goal decomposition agent and resource allocation agent for project management.
Coordinate a question generation agent and answer verification agent for quiz creation.
Orchestrate a design agent, implementation agent, and QA agent for a UI component.
Coordinate multiple specialized agents to produce a comprehensive market research report.
Orchestrate a code explanation agent and refactoring agent for improving legacy code.
Coordinate an anomaly detection agent and root cause analysis agent for log analysis.
Orchestrate a hypothesis generation agent and experimental design agent for research planning.
Coordinate a data labeling agent and quality control agent for building training datasets.
Orchestrate a meeting transcription agent and action item extraction agent.
Coordinate a compliance checking agent and remediation suggestion agent for policy review.
Orchestrate a concept explanation agent and analogy generation agent for educational content.
Coordinate a persona creation agent and dialogue generation agent for user testing scenarios.
Orchestrate a news monitoring agent and executive summary agent for daily intelligence reports.
